commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 2:5 And the house which I build will be great: for great is our God above all gods. Douay Rheims 1609 After which things he gathered together all the ancients of Israel, and all the princes of the tribes, and the heads of families, of the children of Israel into Jerusalem, to bring (a) the ark of the covenant of our Lord from the City of David, which is Sion. (a) Another ark was not made, because that was most holy & most excellent, which Moses made. Likewise other holy things of the tabernacle were brought into the Temple with great solemnity.
